backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Journey, LocationInfo, CityAlbum, TravelSpot, MusicAlbum, etc.) and stable state maps for a travel/location management app on the Internet Computer, integrating blob storage, access control, and registry mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that a new standalone React component `TimeControls.tsx` was created to encapsulate time-mode toggle controls, with high confidence and a single test requirement.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference document for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, loading the SunCalc library via CDN and mounting the React app at the `#root` div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app with ThemeProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and QueryClientProvider, rendering LocationMapExplorer alongside a BackendDebugger utility and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel component providing UI for managing journeys, schedules, travel spots, music albums, and geographic data, using journey title as the unique schedule key and filtering journeys by date.
Utility React component that exposes the backend actor to `window.backend` for browser console debugging, logging available commands, principal info, and role checks.
frontend/src/components/CityAlbumManager: Component for managing city media albums, supporting image/video file uploads with validation, social media link management with real-time URL validation, and per-city album browsing.
frontend/src/components/CityloguePanel.t: File appears to be empty or has no content provided.
frontend/src/components/GeonameGeographi: A React component for managing geographical city data, supporting paginated browsing, search, CRUD operations, and bulk import from GeoNames TSV files with classification logic.
frontend/src/components/HeartRating.tsx: A reusable heart-based rating component (0–10 scale) that supports partial fills, hover states, click-to-rate interactions, and read-only display.
frontend/src/components/InteractiveGlobe: A Three.js-powered 3D interactive globe component with features including timezone overlays, city markers, country borders/labels, solar terminator, twilight rendering, and flight path animations.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/Doodle: Renders a scrapbook/doodle-styled itinerary dialog for a journey, displaying schedule items grouped by day with Comic Sans fonts, amber color palette, and decorative elements.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/RetroI: Renders a vintage postcard/retro-styled itinerary dialog for a journey, displaying schedule items grouped by day with serif fonts, postmark effects, and an amber-red color palette.
frontend/src/components/LocationInfoDial: A dialog component for adding, editing, or deleting location photo info, handling image file upload/preview and persisting data via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/LoginPanel.tsx: An authentication panel dialog using Internet Identity, displaying login/logout status, principal ID, and handling auth state transitions with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/MapComponent.tsx: A Leaflet-based interactive map component that renders travel spots, bookmarks, and schedule items as typed markers with popups, supporting city filtering, media galleries, and bookmark creation.
frontend/src/components/MediaGalleryPopu: A tabbed media gallery popup component that displays photos, videos, and embedded social media links (YouTube/Instagram) with carousel navigation and fullscreen support.
frontend/src/components/MusicAlbumManage: An admin UI component for managing music albums and songs, supporting create/update/delete operations on albums and file-upload-based song addition via dialogs and forms.
frontend/src/components/MusicPanel.tsx: A dialog-based music panel that lists all music albums and their songs, allowing the user to select a song for playback and showing the currently playing track.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayerBar.t: A persistent music player bar component that handles audio playback, play/pause/skip controls, volume, and progress tracking for songs fetched from music albums.
frontend/src/components/TimeControls.tsx: A purely presentational component that renders time display and mode-switching buttons (Real, Hourly, Yearly) with play/pause controls for globe time animations.
frontend/src/components/TimezoneManageme: A React component for uploading and managing timezone GeoJSON data, supporting file upload to an ICP backend canister and IndexedDB caching, with a manual multi-step execution flow for persisting and verifying the data.
A collapsible panel displaying all journeys filtered by live/upcoming/past tabs, with expandable schedule details, flight animation triggers, and support for doodle and retro itinerary dialog views.
frontend/src/components/TravelSpotManage: A CRUD management component for travel spots that allows users to add, edit, delete, and search spots by city, with support for media file uploads and social media link attachments.
frontend/src/components/VibesPanel.tsx: A panel that aggregates and displays travel spots and bookmarks grouped by city and type, with collapsible sections and type-specific icons and colors for each item.
frontend/src/components/WebsiteLayoutPan: A settings panel for managing website layout preferences such as toggling the music player bar, setting the default search location, and displaying the current local time with UTC offset.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both authenticated (Internet Identity) and anonymous actors, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central data-fetching and mutation hooks file using React Query and the ICP actor, covering journeys, locations, music, travel spots, schedules, social links, and geocoding utilities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (colors, sidebar, music player), and utility class overrides for heading colors and layout.
frontend/src/lib/solarCalculations.ts: Provides a function to calculate solar declination angle for a given day of the year, plus test cases validating results at equinoxes and solstices.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneOffsetUtils.ts: Exports a utility function that returns all timezone IDs matching a given UTC offset (with quarter-hour precision) by querying the Intl API against GeoJSON timezone data.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneUtils.ts: Handles loading and caching of timezone GeoJSON boundary data, using IndexedDB as a local cache and falling back to a backend fetch, with validation and window-level caching.
frontend/src/lib/TzOverlayV2.ts: Renders timezone boundaries on a 3D globe using Three.js, with support for quarter-hour UTC offset precision, antimeridian unwrapping, and optional translucent fill meshes for hovered regions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity authentication providers.
frontend/src/pages/LocationMapExplorer.t: Main map explorer page component that integrates a 2D/3D map toggle, location search, timezone overlays, travel travelogue/vibes panels, music player, and flight animations with live clock updates.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleDayStyling.ts: Provides color palette and helper functions for styling schedule items by day index, including day label generation, color lookup, day index computation from timestamps, and human-readable day context strings.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleRouteUtils.ts: Utilities for grouping and sorting schedule items by calendar day and time, and building per-day ordered route coordinate arrays for map rendering.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, accordion animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing an in-progress 3-step refactor to extract time controls from InteractiveGlobe.tsx into a standalone TimeControls.tsx component and relocate them to the left panel.
